violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026
Various food was observed being held past the date of disposition. Food was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room is lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen and entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

The facility is lacking a 3-bay sink in the bar area. A sink with at least 3 compartments shall be provided for manually washing, rinsing, and SANITIZING EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
